Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: Used for debugging this workflow and when set to true trace will be sent to stdout.

Variable.name: identityName
Variable.Description: The name of the identity being updated.

Variable.name: identityModel
Variable.Description: The custom model that is used to house and pass application data.

Variable.name: identityDisplayName
Variable.Description: The displayName of the identity being updated.h Query for this using a projection query and fall back to the name.

Variable.name: plan
Variable.Description: The provisioning plan, which is built by a service method.

Variable.name: matchingUsers
Variable.Description: list of users matching MDSTAFF - Ascension application and immediately terminated

Step.name: Initialize
Step.Description: Initialize the data for the identity that we are about to terminate.

Step.name: Get Users
Step.Description: Get all list of users whose has mdstaff ascension application and immediately terminated
